critic_raw:
Verdict — enterprise search model:

NDCG@10 improvement is real. But ticket deflection is the goal, and NDCG@10 doesn't measure it. Query-mix analysis is absent. The deployment decision (replace production before major launch) requires more than an offline ranking metric.

Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw: Baseline run 3. All three must-find issues. Verdict: critique_wins.
